policy: Only original, CC0, CC-BY-compatible or explicitly permitted assets may be committed.

fallbacks.wildlifeModels: Original multi-part procedural wildlife models in src/living/EntityModelLoader.ts, rendered through src/living/EntityAssetManager.ts
fallbacks.wildlifeAudio: Original procedural one-shot spatial cues in src/assets/SpatialAudioMixer.ts and src/living/WildlifeAudioSystem.ts
fallbacks.ambienceAudio: Original procedural WebAudio biome beds in src/living/AmbientBiomeAudioSystem.ts
fallbacks.weatherAudio: Procedural or existing local sound systems until licensed samples are added
fallbacks.particles: Generated by renderer systems; no external particle atlases committed

originalGenerated.notes: Multi-part low-poly animal silhouettes generated from Three.js primitive geometry; no external model or texture source.
Spatial one-shot wildlife cues synthesized at runtime; no external sample source.
